dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp finally collects all pieces after some intense parkour

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp builds the comm device and tries once more

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: There is a faint whisper through the static

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Hello, hello? Can you hear me?

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I need a signal booster, but I need…

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: She looks out into the distance and sees land

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Great Morpsalon, land! I can build a signal booster there!

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp ventures to the land by tearing apart her ship to get there
